$comment: Portfolio-standard slice template. Match field names and shape exactly.
acceptance_criteria: New behavior covered by at least one test in test/critical-ops/.
Critical-ops suite still runs under 30 seconds.
stop_conditions: A bug fix would require a Firestore schema change — halt and document.
An existing baseline test would change behavior — halt and apply the baseline_update_protocol.
baseline_update_protocol: If output changed, produce a human-readable diff (field, old, new, scenario id).
Classify the change: intended, unintended, or unclear.
Update expected outputs only when the change is intended and documented.
Store baseline metadata: corpus version, engine/schema version, seed/fixture id, generation command.

final_response_required_format.regression_summary: Fast corpus + slow corpus results (or N/A).
